title: spiranthes triloba
intro: Spiranthes triloba, also known as the northern ladies' tresses, is a type of orchid native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Spiranthes triloba include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
